[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000100 1
1 01100010 3
2 00101000 2
3 11111011 7
4 10011000 3
5 00001011 3
6 11111011 7
7 00000000 a

01 10 00011000 2
12 21 01011000 3
23 32 00000000 a match 7
34 43 00000000 a match 7
45 54 00000010 1
56 65 00100000 1
67 76 00000001 1
70 07 10011001 4

02 20 10111001 5
13 31 00000000 a match 7
24 42 00001011 3 match 5
35 53 00000000 a match 7
46 64 00000101 2
57 75 01000010 2
60 06 00100001 2
71 17 01011000 3

03 30 00000000 a match 7
14 41 00001000 1
25 52 01100010 3 match 1
36 63 00000000 a match 7
47 74 00001011 3 match 5
50 05 00100000 1
61 16 00000000 a match 7
72 27 11011011 6

04 40 00001001 2
15 51 01000000 1
26 62 00100001 2
37 73 00000000 a match 7
